Name: New Horizon Aircraft Ltd
Description: New Horizon Aircraft Ltd (HOVRW) is a pioneering aerospace company dedicated to developing advanced aircraft systems that emphasize sustainability and operational efficiency. With a strong focus on innovation, the company is responding to the growing demand for eco-friendly solutions in both the commercial and private aviation sectors. By leveraging cutting-edge technologies and forming strategic partnerships, New Horizon Aircraft is poised for significant growth, enhancing its competitive position in the dynamic aerospace landscape while maintaining a steadfast commitment to safety and quality.
